Employees.question: Get employee first and last names
Get all unique department IDs from employees
Get employees ordered by last name
Employees.answer: SELECT * FROM Employees ORDER BY lastname ASC;

Employees.question: Get top 5 highest paid employees
Employees.answer: SELECT * FROM Employees ORDER BY salary DESC LIMIT 5;

Employees.question: Get employees with salary greater than 80000
Get employees whose first name starts with A
Employees.answer: SELECT * FROM Employees WHERE firstname LIKE 'A%';

Employees.question: Get the highest salary in the company
Get the lowest salary in the company
Get number of employees per department
Employees.answer: SELECT departmentId, COUNT(*) AS total FROM Employees GROUP BY departmentId;

Employees.question: Get employees with email containing company
Employees.answer: SELECT * FROM Employees WHERE email LIKE '%company%';

Departments.question: Get departments ordered by name
Departments.answer: SELECT * FROM Departments ORDER BY departmentName ASC;

Departments.question: Get employees with their department name
Departments.answer: SELECT e.firstname, e.lastname, d.departmentName FROM Employees e JOIN Departments d ON e.departmentId = d.departmentId;

Departments.question: Get average salary per department
Departments.answer: SELECT d.departmentName, AVG(e.salary) AS avg_salary FROM Employees e JOIN Departments d ON e.departmentId = d.departmentId GROUP BY d.departmentName;

Departments.question: Get departments with more than 3 employees
Departments.answer: SELECT d.departmentName, COUNT(e.employeeId) AS total FROM Departments d JOIN Employees e ON d.departmentId = e.departmentId GROUP BY d.departmentName HAVING COUNT(e.employeeId) > 3;

Departments.question: Get departments with no employees
Departments.answer: SELECT * FROM Departments WHERE departmentId NOT IN (SELECT DISTINCT departmentId FROM Employees);

Departments.question: Get the department with the highest total salary
Departments.answer: SELECT d.departmentName, SUM(e.salary) AS total FROM Departments d JOIN Employees e ON d.departmentId = e.departmentId GROUP BY d.departmentName ORDER BY total DESC LIMIT 1;

Employees_Departments.question: Get each employee with their department name
Employees_Departments.answer: SELECT e.firstname, e.lastname, d.departmentName FROM Employees e INNER JOIN Departments d ON e.departmentId = d.departmentId;

Employees_Departments.question: Get all departments and their employees including departments with no employees
Employees_Departments.answer: SELECT d.departmentName, e.firstname, e.lastname FROM Departments d LEFT JOIN Employees e ON d.departmentId = e.departmentId;

Employees_Departments.question: Get all employees including those with no department
Employees_Departments.answer: SELECT e.firstname, e.lastname, d.departmentName FROM Employees e LEFT JOIN Departments d ON e.departmentId = d.departmentId;

Employees_Departments.question: Get average salary per department name
Employees_Departments.answer: SELECT d.departmentName, AVG(e.salary) AS avg_salary FROM Employees e JOIN Departments d ON e.departmentId = d.departmentId GROUP BY d.departmentName;

Employees_Departments.question: Get departments with more than 3 employees
Employees_Departments.answer: SELECT d.departmentName, COUNT(e.employeeId) AS total FROM Departments d JOIN Employees e ON d.departmentId = e.departmentId GROUP BY d.departmentName HAVING COUNT(e.employeeId) > 3;

Employees_Departments.question: Get the highest paid employee in each department
Employees_Departments.answer: SELECT d.departmentName, e.firstname, e.lastname, e.salary FROM Employees e JOIN Departments d ON e.departmentId = d.departmentId WHERE e.salary = (SELECT MAX(salary) FROM Employees WHERE departmentId = e.departmentId);

Employees_Departments.question: Get total salary cost per department
Employees_Departments.answer: SELECT d.departmentName, SUM(e.salary) AS total_salary FROM Departments d JOIN Employees e ON d.departmentId = e.departmentId GROUP BY d.departmentName ORDER BY total_salary DESC;

Employees_Departments.question: Get employees who earn more than their department average
Employees_Departments.answer: SELECT e.firstname, e.lastname, e.salary FROM Employees e WHERE e.salary > (SELECT AVG(salary) FROM Employees WHERE departmentId = e.departmentId);

Customers.question: Get customer first and last names
Get customers ordered by last name
Customers.answer: SELECT * FROM Customers ORDER BY lastname ASC;

Customers.question: Get distinct countries customers are from
Get customers whose last name contains son
Customers.answer: SELECT * FROM Customers WHERE lastname LIKE '%son%';

Customers.question: Get customers from a specific city Toronto
Count customers per country
Customers.answer: SELECT country, COUNT(*) AS total FROM Customers GROUP BY country;

Orders.question: Get orders ordered by date descending
Orders.answer: SELECT * FROM Orders ORDER BY orderDate DESC;

Orders.question: Get total revenue from all orders
Get orders with amount greater than 100
Get orders placed in 2025
Orders.answer: SELECT * FROM Orders WHERE orderDate BETWEEN '2025-01-01' AND '2025-12-31';

Orders.question: Get number of orders per customer
Orders.answer: SELECT customerId, COUNT(*) AS total_orders FROM Orders GROUP BY customerId;

Orders.question: Get customers with their orders
Orders.answer: SELECT c.firstname, c.lastname, o.orderId, o.totalAmount FROM Customers c JOIN Orders o ON c.customerId = o.customerId;

Orders.question: Get customers who have more than 1 order
Orders.answer: SELECT customerId, COUNT(*) AS total FROM Orders GROUP BY customerId HAVING COUNT(*) > 1;

Orders.question: Get the customer who spent the most
Orders.answer: SELECT customerId, SUM(totalAmount) AS total_spent FROM Orders GROUP BY customerId ORDER BY total_spent DESC LIMIT 1;

Orders.question: Get total revenue per customer
Orders.answer: SELECT c.firstname, c.lastname, SUM(o.totalAmount) AS revenue FROM Customers c JOIN Orders o ON c.customerId = o.customerId GROUP BY c.customerId;

Orders.question: Get orders sorted by amount descending
Orders.answer: SELECT * FROM Orders ORDER BY totalAmount DESC;
